nasb.text: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak with other tongues, as the Spirit was giving them utterance.

esv.text: And they were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak in other tongues as the Spirit gave them utterance.

cnv.text: 他們都被聖靈充滿，就照著聖靈所賜給他們的口才，用別種語言說出話來。

ccb.text: 大家都被圣灵充满，得到圣灵所赐的才能，说起别的语言来。

csbs.text: 于是他们都被圣灵充满，就照着圣灵赐给他们的话，开始说出别种语言。
